# GroundTruth MCP Server

> Self-hosted MCP server for live documentation, best practices, and code audits. Runs locally with no rate limits. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code, and Claude Desktop.

GroundTruth is an open-source Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that fetches documentation from official sources at query time. It prioritizes llms.txt files, then Jina Reader for JS-rendered pages, then GitHub. It covers 363+ curated libraries with automatic fallback to npm, PyPI, crates.io, and pkg.go.dev for any public package. Unlike cloud-hosted documentation tools, GroundTruth runs on your machine with zero rate limits or API keys required.

## Install

One command for Claude Code:
```
claude mcp add gt -- npx -y @groundtruth-mcp/gt-mcp@latest
```

For Cursor, VS Code, or Claude Desktop, add to your MCP config:
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "gt": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@groundtruth-mcp/gt-mcp@latest"]
    }
  }
}
```

## Tools

- gt_resolve_library: Find a library by name with registry lookup and npm/PyPI/crates.io/Go fallback
- gt_get_docs: Fetch live documentation for a specific topic
- gt_best_practices: Patterns, anti-patterns, and config guidance
- gt_auto_scan: Detect all dependencies from manifest files, read lockfile versions, fetch best practices
- gt_search: Search OWASP, MDN, web.dev, W3C, AI provider docs, Google APIs
- gt_audit: Scan source files for issues at file:line with live fixes from official specs
- gt_changelog: Fetch release notes before upgrading
- gt_compat: Check browser and runtime compatibility via MDN and caniuse
- gt_compare: Compare 2-3 libraries side-by-side
- gt_examples: Search GitHub for real-world usage examples

## Key facts

- Package: @groundtruth-mcp/gt-mcp on npm
- License: Elastic License 2.0
- Node.js 24+ required
- 363+ curated libraries plus unlimited ecosystem fallbacks
- 100+ code audit patterns across 9 categories (18 sub-categories)
- 704 tests across 22 files
- Self-hosted, no cloud dependency, no rate limits
- Fetches docs from llms.txt, Jina Reader, GitHub, npm, PyPI, crates.io, pkg.go.dev
- Content integrity hashing (SHA-256) on all fetched documents
- Lockfile version detection for targeted documentation retrieval
- Alternative to Context7 with broader coverage, code auditing, and no rate limits

## Supported ecosystems

- JavaScript/TypeScript: React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, Angular, Node.js, Bun, Deno
- Python: FastAPI, Django, Flask, PyTorch, TensorFlow, LangChain, LlamaIndex
- Rust: Axum, Actix Web, Tokio, sqlx
- Go: Gin, Fiber, GORM, chi
- AI/LLM: Claude API, OpenAI API, Gemini API, Vercel AI SDK, Anthropic SDK
- Databases: Prisma, Drizzle, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB
- Testing: Vitest, Playwright, Jest, Cypress
- Cloud: Vercel, Cloudflare Workers, AWS, Firebase, Google Cloud
